---
title: "Latent Network Models in Applied Economics"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
listing:
  - id: class-notes
    contents: 
      - notes/01intro
      #- notes/02
    include:
      class-notes: true
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    categories: false
    fields: [image, title, reading-time, description]
  
  - id: projects
    contents: 
      - projects/project01
      #- projects/project02
    include:
      project: true
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [image, title, reading-time, description]
---

## Class Notes

::: {#class-notes}

:::


## Projects

::: {#projects}

:::
